hero.description: Manage your crypto with the apps you already use... Zi0n Crypto protects your device without changing how you operate. Military-grade security meets everyday usability.

cryptoDilemma.title: The crypto security dilemma
cryptoDilemma.subtitle: Zi0n is the ultimate solution that combines the best of both worlds.

hardware.title: Hardware Wallets
hardware.description: Maximum offline security, but impractical for daily operations and active trading.

zion.title: ZiOn

hot.title: Hot Wallets
hot.description: High convenience and quick access, but vulnerable to malware, phishing, and device theft.

operaCripto.title: Trade your crypto whenever you want
operaCripto.subtitle: You don't need a new wallet. You need a safer environment to use what you already have.
operaCripto.description: Zi0n Crypto protects your Web3 applications and digital wallets in an isolated system that reduces exposure to threats, attacks, and unauthorized access. Because the security of your assets starts with the security of your device.

apps.title: Official Apps
apps.description: We verify the integrity of your installed apps.

wipe.title: Auto-wipe
wipe.description: 9 wipe functions to protect your information.

restore.title: Secure Restore
restore.description: Recover your system with your credentials already imported.

howItWorks.title: How does Zi0n Crypto work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Invisible protection in three simple steps.

install.title: Secure Installation
install.description: Install Zi0n on your device via a QR code and activate your secure environment in just a few minutes.

isolate.title: Isolation
isolate.description: Isolate the apps that matter most to you in an environment designed to maximize their security.

protect.title: Active Protection
protect.description: Zi0n blocks multiple risk vectors through 9 security functions designed to protect your digital vault.

control.title: Total Control
control.description: Your apps and digital assets remain protected by multiple security layers designed to reduce risks.

features.title: What does Zi0n include?
features.subtitle: Features designed to withstand the greatest threats

cableWipe.title: Cable detection wipe
cableWipe.description: All device information is wiped when a cable is detected, protecting you against theft or loss.

securityPin.title: Security PIN
securityPin.description: Want to erase everything in seconds? Enter a PIN and skip lengthy processes.

extraPin.title: Extra PIN
extraPin.description: If you enter a specific number before your PIN on the lock screen, the system will be wiped in seconds.

simProtection.title: Unauthorized SIM or eSIM
simProtection.description: If the system detects a SIM or eSIM change, it will request your PIN — otherwise it will wipe the system.

disableCam.title: Disable CAM or MIC
disableCam.description: Don't worry about access to your camera or microphone — you can disable them.

blockCaptures.title: Block captures
blockCaptures.description: Your information is safe — neither screenshots nor screen recordings will be allowed.

noSignal.title: No signal?
noSignal.description: If the system detects no signal for an extended period, it initiates the device wipe.

timedDestruction.title: Timed self-destruct
timedDestruction.description: You can set an inactivity timer to automatically destroy the system.

panicButton.title: Panic button
panicButton.description: Completely wipe the system or perform a button combination on your phone.

securityNotes.title: Security notes
securityNotes.description: Store notes with complete confidence — your notes are end-to-end encrypted.

dynamicVpn.title: Dynamic VPN
dynamicVpn.description: An advanced, dynamic VPN that operates over a decentralized network, constantly rotating the system's IP address globally.

esim.title: International eSIM
esim.description: Includes an international eSIM to guarantee stable access, using multiple carriers globally.

appsConfig.title: Set up Zi0n Crypto with these apps
appsConfig.subtitle: You can choose from 3 app stores to install what you want on your device:

cta.title: Not sure if Zi0n is for you?
cta.highlight: We give you 15 days, no strings attached
cta.description: Don't leave the security of your assets to chance. Join the elite already protecting their assets with Zi0n with a free 14-day trial, no strings attached.

q1.question: What devices are compatible?
q1.answer: Zi0n is compatible with a wide range of Android devices. Contact our team to verify your device's compatibility.

q2.question: If the device is wiped, can I recover my information?
q2.answer: Deleted information cannot be recovered, as the wipe is permanent and secure. We recommend keeping backups of your credentials.

q3.question: How secure is Zi0n Crypto?
q3.answer: Zi0n uses military-grade encryption and multiple security layers designed to protect your digital assets against the most advanced threats.

q4.question: If I want an app not on the list, how do I install it?
q4.answer: You can request the inclusion of additional apps through our support team, who will verify their integrity before approval.

q5.question: What is your refund policy?
q5.answer: We offer a free 14-day trial. If you're not satisfied, you can cancel without obligation during that period.

q6.question: Can I install Zi0n on an iPhone?
q6.answer: Currently Zi0n is designed exclusively for Android devices. We are evaluating options for iOS in the future.

q7.question: What happens with my information? Is it stored?
q7.answer: Zi0n does not store any user information on external servers. All data remains exclusively on your device.

q8.question: Do I lose access to my apps when the system is wiped?
q8.answer: When the system is wiped, all device data is erased. Make sure you have backed up your credentials and recovery seeds.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: GLOBAL INVESTMENT ST S.A.S. (NIT 901206726-2, hereinafter "the Company" or "Zi0n"), with domicile at Calle 7 No. 39-215, Oficina 1009, Edificio Granahorrar, Medellín, Antioquia, Colombia, operates the website https://www.zi0n.io/es (hereinafter, "the Site"). This Cookie Policy explains how we use cookies and similar technologies on the Site, in compliance with Law 1581 of 2012 and related data protection regulations in Colombia.
cookies.privacyFocus: Given our focus on maximum privacy and not collecting unnecessary data, the Site does not use third-party cookies or tracking cookies. We only use strictly necessary cookies for the basic functioning of the Site, if applicable.

section1.title: 1. What Are Cookies?
section1.description: Cookies are small text files stored on your device (computer, phone, or tablet) when you visit a website. They can be used to remember preferences, improve the user experience, or collect analytical data. There are different types:
section1.essentialDesc: Necessary for the site to function (e.g., maintaining sessions).
section1.performanceDesc: Collect anonymous data about site usage.

section2.title: 2. Cookies Used on the Site
section2.description: At Zi0n, we prioritize your privacy and do not collect or store browsing data beyond what is essential to provide the Services. Therefore:
section2.noThirdParty: We do not use third-party, analytics, or advertising cookies.
section2.noThirdPartyDesc: We do not share data with advertising networks, Google Analytics, or other tracking services.
section2.essentialCookiesDesc: We may use temporary (session) technical cookies for basic functions such as secure navigation or QR code processing for installation. These are automatically deleted when the browser is closed and do not collect identifiable personal data.
section2.dataCollectedDesc: None. We do not store information about your visit, IP, location, or behavior on the Site, except for the email address voluntarily provided for registration or contact.
section2.noCookies: If the Site does not use cookies at all (as in static pages without tracking scripts), no cookies will be installed on your device.

section3.title: 3. Cookie Management
section3.description: You can control cookies through your browser settings:
section3.blockDesc: Most browsers (such as Chrome, Firefox, Safari) allow you to reject or delete cookies. Check your browser's help section for instructions.
section3.impactDesc: Blocking essential cookies may affect the Site's functionality, such as QR scanning.
section3.noBanner: We do not use consent banners
section3.noBannerDesc: Since we do not use non-essential cookies, we do not display cookie banners. Your browsing implies acceptance of this Policy.

section4.title: 4. Third-Party Links
section4.description: The Site may contain links to third-party websites (e.g., payment processors). These sites have their own cookie policies, for which we are not responsible. Please review their policies before interacting.

section5.title: 5. Policy Modifications
section5.description: We reserve the right to update this Policy. Changes will be published on the Site and notified by email if applicable, with at least 15 days' advance notice.

section6.title: 6. Contact
section6.description: For questions about this Policy, contact

cookies.footer: This Policy is integrated with our Personal Data Treatment Policy and
